subrequests.text: Our dashboard crashes whenever someone uploads a CSV bigger than ~10MB — need that fixed ASAP, it's hitting customers.
subrequests.reason: 'crashes whenever someone uploads a CSV bigger than ~10MB' — explicit crash on a specific condition; client frames it as something broken ('need that fixed'), not new behavior.

subrequests.text: The whole reports page is painfully slow, takes like 8 seconds to load.
subrequests.reason: 'painfully slow, takes like 8 seconds to load' — quantified latency complaint, behavior is working but not fast enough; no new functionality requested.

subrequests.text: Add a new 'share report via link' feature so people can send a read-only view to clients.
subrequests.reason: 'add a new share report via link feature' — net-new capability requested against an existing reports system; 'new' and 'add' are explicit.

subrequests.text: Figure out why our signup conversion dropped last month. Not sure if it's a bug or just seasonal.
subrequests.reason: 'figure out why' — deliverable is an answer/diagnosis, not a fix. Client explicitly signals uncertainty about cause ('not sure if it's a bug or just seasonal'), confirming the ask is explanatory, not corrective.

confirmation_questions.question: SR1 — dashboard crashes on CSV >10MB: we're treating this as a bugfix (find and fix the crash). Correct?
options: A) Yes, bugfix — find and fix the crash [DEFAULT]
B) No — treat as investigation first (diagnose before committing to a fix)
confirmation_questions.default: A) Yes, bugfix — find and fix the crash

confirmation_questions.question: SR2 — reports page 8-second load time: we're treating this as a perf improvement (hit a latency target, no behavior change). Correct?
options: A) Yes, perf — optimize load time, keep existing behavior [DEFAULT]
B) No — also involves fixing broken functionality (reclassify as bugfix)
confirmation_questions.default: A) Yes, perf — optimize load time, keep existing behavior

confirmation_questions.question: SR3 — 'share report via link': we're treating this as a feature-add to the existing reports system. Correct?
options: A) Yes, feature-add to existing reports system [DEFAULT]
B) No — the sharing system is a fully standalone new product (reclassify as greenfield)
confirmation_questions.default: A) Yes, feature-add to existing reports system

confirmation_questions.question: SR4 — signup conversion drop: we're treating this as an investigation (deliverable = diagnosis/answer). If a bug is found, a separate bugfix subrequest will be scoped. Correct?
options: A) Yes, investigation only for now — answer first, fix later if needed [DEFAULT]
B) No — if a bug is found, fix it immediately within this engagement (fold into bugfix)
C) No — this is out of scope for now; drop it
confirmation_questions.default: A) Yes, investigation only for now — answer first, fix later if needed

escape.note: All four subrequests are non-greenfield (bugfix, perf, feature-add, investigation). No greenfield downstream pipeline applies. Playbooks for bugfix, perf, feature-add, and investigation are not yet authored — HALT after client confirms decomposition and classes.
